creator: ari@dd.com.br
text:
I've installed default FreeBSD 7.0 and see at /var/log/messages (or
console or dmesg -a) a lot of strange messages:

Mar 27 12:47:42 fenix kernel: rtfree: 0xffffff00015170f0 has 1 refs

Apr  1 06:00:06 fenix kernel: rtfree: 0xffffff00015170f0 has 1 refs
Apr  1 12:03:18 fenix kernel: rtfree: 0xffffff00015170f0 has 1 refs

Here goes /etc/rc.conf:

defaultrouter="200.XXX.XXX.1"
hostname="fenix.doctordata.com.br"
ifconfig_rl0="inet 200.XXX.XXX.43 netmask 255.255.255.192"
keymap="br275.cp850"
nfs_client_enable="YES"
nfs_server_enable="YES"
rpcbind_enable="YES"
sshd_enable="YES"


Here goes /var/run/dmesg.boot:
